mapper.sql: s.er_id, s.fuel_type_cd, s.ttl_fuel_wght, s.ttl_co2_emsn, s.use_bgng_dt, s.use_end_dt, s.frst_reg_dt, s.frst_reg_user_id, s.last_chg_dt, s.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM er.tn_er_fuel_smry s WHERE s.er_id = #{erId} AND NOW() BETWEEN s.use_bgng_dt AND s.use_end_dt ORDER BY s.fuel_type_cd ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_er_fuel_smry (er_id, fuel_type_cd, ttl_fuel_wght, ttl_co2_emsn, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{erId}, #{fuelTypeCd}, #{ttlFuelWght}, #{ttlCo2Emsn}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})

INSERT INTO er.tn_er_fuel_smry (er_id, fuel_type_cd, ttl_fuel_wght, ttl_co2_emsn, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstErId}, fuel_type_cd, ttl_fuel_wght, ttl_co2_emsn, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM er.tn_er_fuel_smry WHERE er_id = #{srcErId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
